name: Squealer
alt_names: 野狐丸; スクィーラ
description: Squealer is a queerat, an intelligent species that work as servants to humans. Like others of his species, he's small and has the appearance of a giant rat, but is very intelligent and astute. He is the representative of the Robber Fly, a colony of queerats. ~!His ideals are freedom, equality between humans and queerats, and the end of the monarchy system inside of the queerats colonies where the queen is the absolute ruler. He helps [Saki](https://anilist.co/character/57569) and her friends to escape from the wild queerats that were pursuing them. Later, he rescues [Maria](https://anilist.co/character/57573) and [Mamoru](https://anilist.co/character/57589) from the tainted cats and keeps them in his colony. But his main objective was to get a human child from them to start a revolution.  Once he got the child and bred it until it got the cantus, around 10 years old, he uses it to attack the humans. At this time, Squealer is already the leader of an alliance and commands a large number of soldiers.!~
